text: threw out my back reaching for the remote. this is my life now
my knees sound like a bowl of rice krispies every morning
found a grey hair in my eyebrow today. EYEBROW. its spreading
i used to close the bar now i close my eyes at 9:15pm and im proud
two beers on friday. still recovering on tuesday. send help
someone called me bruh and i had to google if thats good or bad
music peaked in 2003 and i will die on this hill
my metabolism didnt just slow down it filed for retirement
i dont need reading glasses i just have short arms now apparently
got excited about a new sponge for the kitchen. this is 37
sneezed and pulled something in my neck. out for 3 days
my back goes out more than i do lmao
i said no cap to my kid and she looked at me like i was dying
9pm is basically midnight when ur 40. math checks out
grey hairs multiplying faster than my bills
ate pizza after 8pm woke up feeling like i committed a crime
the font on everything is getting smaller right?? RIGHT??
my knee just predicted rain better than the weather app
nirvana was 30 years ago and i need to sit down
i stretch before getting out of bed now. non negotiable
what is a skibidi and why does my nephew keep saying it
used to pull all nighters now i pull all-day-recoveries
my reading glasses are just for aesthetics. i look distinguished
went to bed at 830 slept like a rock no regrets
three ibuprofen before noon is a personality at this point
turned 35 and my body started sending me terms and conditions
remember when you could eat taco bell at 2am and just be fine
found grey hair number 47 today. yes i count them
kids at work asked if i remember 9/11 like it was ancient rome
i make the dad noise when i sit down now. its involuntary
my spotify wrapped was just 90s alternative on repeat and im ok with that
hung over for 2 days from wine. WINE. not even the hard stuff
bending down is now a strategic decision i plan in advance
is lowkey still a thing or did i miss the memo
8pm bedtime isnt giving up its called winning at self care
my metabolism said new phone who dis sometime around 30
popped my knee standing up and three people asked if i was ok
i hold menus at arms length and i DONT need glasses ok
radiohead > whatever the kids listen to now. fact not opinion
woke up injured from sleeping. SLEEPING. in a BED.
the grey is coming in patches like my lawn
one margarita and i need a full business day to recover
my kid said im cheugy and honestly i dont even care anymore
asleep by 9 up by 5 this is the way
ate salad for lunch still gained weight. explain science
i wear reading glasses ironically. very ironic. cant see without them
my hip flexors have filed a formal complaint
rap used to have WORDS you could understand
sneezed so hard i saw god and threw out my back simultaneously
tried to understand what based means. failed. moved on
friday night highlight was organizing my spice rack. lived
the hangover now comes with a 72 hour subscription
found my first grey nose hair. new level unlocked
in bed by 830 and honestly living my best life
i look at stairs the way i used to look at mountains
my body is a temple. an ancient crumbling temple
cant read the menu without my phone flashlight anymore lol
every song on the radio sounds the same and yes i know how that sounds
sat on the floor. getting up took negotiations with my knees
what does it mean when a kid calls you slay. am i in danger
9pm friday and im already in pajamas. peak performance
my back has more opinions than my mother in law
drank 2 IPAs and my body acted like i drank battery acid
grey hair speedrun any% no dye challenge day 847
holding the phone farther away isnt the same as needing glasses
fell asleep during a movie at 7pm. on a saturday. prime years
metabolism left the chat around my 32nd birthday
my ankle just cracked so loud the dog got scared
real music required actual instruments. thats all im saying
threw my back out putting on socks. regular socks. nothing fancy
someone said no cap and i thought they lost a hat
10pm on new years felt like 3am. went to bed. no shame
i can gain 5 lbs just by looking at bread now
these arent reading glasses theyre style glasses that happen to magnify
my joints have a whole morning playlist of pops and cracks
remember when we could just EAT and not think about it
took me til wednesday to recover from a sunday bbq
grey chest hair is a thing apparently and i am not okay
fell asleep at my kids recital. front row. they saw
bought orthopedic shoes and theyre honestly incredible
my right knee knows rain is coming 24hrs before it does
what is giving and why is everything giving something
was in bed by 8 read til 830 slept 9 hours. elite
looked at a cheeseburger. gained a pound. science is broken
i only zoom in on my phone for the AESTHETIC not because i cant see
my lower back just filed for workers comp
green day came out 30 years ago. i am dust
one glass of red wine = 2 day headache at 41. this is fine
my kid called me an npc and i had to pretend i wasnt hurt
asleep before the sun sets in summer. unbothered
i eat one cookie and my body stores it for the apocalypse
reading the back of cereal boxes at arms length is normal right
my shoulder clicks every time i reach for something. every time
bands dont even have bass solos anymore smh
got up too fast and saw the void. sat back down
tried to rizz my wife she said im too old to use that word
lights out at 845 alarm at 5. this is freedom actually
ate a single taco at 10pm. heartburn til noon. worth it tho
found a grey in my beard and honestly it looks distinguished
my hip popped so loud in yoga the instructor stopped class
